creator: monkey@crackula.com
text:
i've been using this, with scott's patches, ever since i submitted it,
and it's been working perfectly for me. i have a sony superslim 505FX,
running 4.3-REL. i've had absolutely no problems with that or the other
thingy i submitted, the name of which escapes me.

is there anything more that i should be doing to have this maybe
committed? i had assumed that there was some glaring problem and people
weren't teling me, and that's why i'd heard nothing ::)...

-Adam


Ben Hughes took 0.3K on Tue, Sep 11, 2001 at 07:26:20PM +0100 to say:
> hi
> 
>    just tried using this (the one with additionl bits from Scott Renfro) on a
> Thinkpad 240 running 4.3-RELEASE, it's working well. shows remaining charge
> and so forth (tho shows 00:00 when i plug AC in)
> 
> Excellent, cheers (:
